subject: [AAI] Revert commits that are breaking the master branch
commit_message:
[AAI] Revert commits that are breaking the master branch

This reverts:
b31e250091cd68edb77f3158691844decda82fc8
46961c4794a17f72643bd491af6c159ea7e53380

which are our main suspects for breaking testing in the master branch.
As this issue prevents many SO related patches from being merged let's
first revert those to make master work once again.

Issue-ID: SO-3216
Change-Id: I7f7daaaef3f7911afb5c8729c296773a630b5fb6
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

@Dan Timoney seems to have fixed the SDNC issue on his side with a subsequent commit. Can we please look at https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/oom/+/112445 that addresses the SO issue? Reverting v20 and all our images back is going to cause heartache in Guilin for our functional use cases.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> @Dan Timoney seems to have fixed the SDNC issue on his side with a subsequent commit. Can we please look at https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/oom/+/112445 that addresses the SO issue? Reverting v20 and all our images back is going to cause heartache in Guilin for our functional use cases.

As far as I can see here:
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//112445-4/index.html

The review that you pointed us to still fails the basic_vm smoke test

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> > 
> > @Dan Timoney seems to have fixed the SDNC issue on his side with a subsequent commit. Can we please look at https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/oom/+/112445 that addresses the SO issue? Reverting v20 and all our images back is going to cause heartache in Guilin for our functional use cases.
> 
> As far as I can see here:
> https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//112445-4/index.html
> 
> The review that you pointed us to still fails the basic_vm smoke test

BTW
We expect that the revert is only temporary. We want to revert to get green master once again and then you can introduce new images but this time making sure that gating is all the time green.

I've reverted everything till ~24.08:

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/112484

Let's see if it works and then I'll be narrowing the scope of revert as much as possible
